steps: Contact Deutsche Bank Custody to report overpayment of EUR 3,093.75 on DBK dividend for account 801234567
Request refund citing DE-NO tax treaty rate of 26.375% vs applied 25% withholding
Provide calculations showing correct net should be EUR 165,656.25 not EUR 168,750
Submit formal reclaim with treaty certification if required by Deutsche Bank

references.title: German Federal Ministry of Finance – Tax Treaties
